title: Full Archive Map
label: Full-system opt-in
summary: A broad but useful map for readers who want books, offers, launches, share kits, feeds, download packs, evidence routes, and the full Matrix Reprogrammed reading order in one pathway.
boundary: Lead magnets are public orientation assets with a seven-day intelligence window. They do not increase evidence strength or replace trust/privacy pages.
promise: Get the full map of the Matrix Reprogrammed archive: books, evidence lanes, free briefs, live intel, offers, and the cleanest route through them.
readerOutcome: The reader gets a complete navigation map rather than a random pile of pages.
whatYouLearn: Where to start if you are new to the site.
Which book series fits which interest: intelligence, crime, symbolic power, survival, trust, or Black File.
How free briefs, offers, downloads, videos, and live intel connect.
Which trust/evidence pages to check before entering controversial material.
checklist: Open the Evidence Vault for source context.
Use the Launch Room for campaigns.
Use the Offer Center when ready to buy.
nextBestStep: Open the Book Universe and choose the reader path that fits your interest.
